_description: Playwright/Chromium: browser binaries and Linux deps for E2E + Playwright/Chrome DevTools MCP
_bootstrap: echo 'Installing Playwright Chromium and system dependencies...'
if [ -f package-lock.json ]; then npm ci --ignore-scripts; fi
# Always install Chromium for the @playwright/mcp@latest version that .mcp.json launches.
# Also installs system deps (apt). Idempotent on re-run.
# If the project pins its own Playwright version, install its matching Chromium too (browser only — deps are already there).
